title: dianthus fruticosus
intro: Dianthus fruticosus, also known as the Rock Pink or Bush Pink, is a flowering plant species in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, which help soothe stomach problems and prevent infections. The health benefits of Dianthus fruticosus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Dianthus fruticosus can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture by infusing the flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal and health benefits.
